name: Okta Rate-Limit Violation Spike (24 hours)
description: Detects repeated Okta rate-limit violation events that can indicate abusive traffic or credential attack activity.
query: SELECT COALESCE(l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS principal, COUNT(*) AS violation_events, MAX(l.published) AS last_violation FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = l.actor_id WHERE (LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) = 'core.concurrency.org.limit.violation' OR LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) RLIKE '.*rate_limit.*(violation|exceeded).*') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY COALESCE(l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown'), COALESCE(u.login, u.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
remediation: Investigate principals with repeated rate-limit violations for abusive automation, brute-force behavior, or misconfigured integrations.
